untranslatable_reason: Beta calculation and beta-sorted quintile/decile construction are not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. This strategy requires custom factor computation (beta estimation using rolling regression) and multi-asset portfolio construction logic that cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators. The 'beta_quintile' and 'rebalance_period' references are conceptual placeholders and do not correspond to any allowed indicator. Additionally, country-neutral portfolio construction requires cross-asset allocation logic outside the scope of single-security entry/exit rules.
translation_notes: SSRN_2049939_11 is a factor-based statistical arbitrage strategy requiring: (1) beta estimation across rolling windows, (2) country-level grouping and sorting, (3) multi-leg portfolio construction with leverage (long 1.52x, short 0.71x), and (4) regular rebalancing. These operations are incompatible with single-security technical indicator rules. Implementation requires a dedicated factor engine with cross-sectional analysis capabilities.
